intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy using the standard QC → normalization → HVG → PCA → clustering → UMAP workflow.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

input.title: Standard scanpy QC and clustering for GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0)
input.summary: Load the first sample, run QC metrics, filter cells and genes, normalize, identify highly variable genes, perform PCA and clustering, generate UMAP visualization and marker gene table.
input.rationale: Establish the baseline cell population structure and quality for the day-0 timepoint before comparing to day-7 or integrating with other samples.
input.assumptions:
- Using the 10x count matrix from GSE192391 sample 1 (GSM5746259)
- Standard thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, mitochondrial% < 20%
- Target library size: 10,000 UMI/cell
- HVG: top 2,000 genes (scanpy default)
- Clustering resolution: 1.0 (Leiden algorithm)
- Organism: Homo sapiens (mitochondrial genes start with 'MT-')

steps.title: Load the first sample
steps.description: Load GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0) from the registered dataset, inspect shape and basic stats

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Run sc.pp.calculate_qc_metrics to compute n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito per cell

steps.title: Filter cells and genes
steps.description: Remove cells with n_genes < 200 or pct_mito > 0.20; remove genes detected in <3 cells
